hero.headline: Plan a week of meals from the dishes you already cook.
hero.description: A calm weekly meal planner for small households. Build a library of the dishes you actually cook, plan the week, and let the grocery list write itself.

howItWorks.heading: Three steps, then it mostly runs itself.

library.title: Build your library
library.body: Add the dishes you already cook, with their ingredients. It grows a little each week.

plan.title: Plan the week
plan.body: Assign dishes to days. Reuse last week, or duplicate a week that worked well.

shop.title: Shop the list
shop.body: Your groceries arrive grouped by category and ready. Tick items off as you shop.

features.heading: Everything the weekly shop needs, and nothing it does not.
features.lead: MealLoop is built around one quiet loop: the dishes you cook, the week you plan, the list you shop.

library.title: Your dish library
library.body: Keep every meal you cook in one place, with its ingredients attached. No more starting from a blank page each week.

plan.title: A simple weekly plan
plan.body: Drop dishes into a seven-day grid. Breakfast, lunch, dinner — plan as much or as little as you like.

groceries.title: Groceries that write themselves
groceries.body: Every dish you plan adds its ingredients to one grouped shopping list. Check things off as you shop.

photo.title: Add a dish from a photo
photo.body: Photograph a meal and MealLoop drafts the dish and its ingredients. You review and save in seconds.

loop.heading: A week that comes back around.
loop.body: Most weeks you cook the same handful of meals. MealLoop remembers them, so planning the next week takes minutes instead of a fresh start. Duplicate a week you liked and adjust from there.

screenshots.heading: See it in your hand.
screenshots.lead: The same quiet design across every screen, from the library to the list you carry to the shop.

captions.groceries: One grouped list, ready to shop.

cta.heading: Cook the week with a little less friction.
cta.body: Build your library once, then let the plan and the grocery list follow from it.

footer.tagline: Plan a week of meals from the dishes you already cook.

appStore.label: Download MealLoop on the App Store

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.body: The page you’re looking for doesn’t exist or has moved.
